parameters.jsonBody: ={"api_key":"$env.TAVILY_API_KEY","query":"DHS Department Homeland Security industry day vendor conference procurement upcoming 2026","search_depth":"advanced","max_results":10,"include_raw_content":true}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_opportunity_tracker (opp_title, agency, dept, data_source, source_url, stage, ai_analysis, gda_score, gda_label, last_refreshed, solicitation_number) VALUES ('{{ ("[INDUSTRY DAY] " + ($json.event_name || "")).replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ ($json.agency || "DHS").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'Department of Homeland Security', 'DHS Industry Day', '{{ $json.source_url || $json.registration_url || "" }}', 'Pre-RFP', '{{ (($json.description || "") + " | Date: " + ($json.date || "TBD") + " | Location: " + ($json.location || "TBD") + " | Registration: " + ($json.registration_url || "N/A") + " | Relevance: " + ($json.relevance_to_gda || "")).replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,2000) }}', 35, 'MONITOR', NOW(), '{{ "DHS-ID-" + ($json.event_name || "unknown").replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, "-").substring(0,80) }}') ON CONFLICT (solicitation_number) DO UPDATE SET ai_analysis = EXCLUDED.ai_analysis, last_refreshed = NOW()
